content:
ROK, 16, high school student, wrestler - has an eating disorder, was chubby as a kid and bullied before high school, then over one summer he sprouted up and leaned out and returned to high school with new confidence, though the bullying hasn’t left him. He only recently has friends, was a loner previously and video gaming nerd—however now wrestling is his world. He practices wrestling at home with a robotic device that holds him down in pins and he needs to try and escape. His first girlfriend just broke up with him. Has a good sense of humor, and is quite sensitive but tries to hide it. Irreverently anti religious though goes to a catholic school. WANTS to get a girlfriend, doesn’t care too much about wrestling.

SUS, 17, high school, ballerina - deserves to be the best, and deserves the entire world. Very goofy, doesn’t realize she is pretty. Big eyes. Super dedicated, able to commit and commits overly so. Never had a relationship, has no times for boys. She also suffers from bouts of serious bipolar- super manic to super depressed. Wants the part, but then is feeling lessened by the part because of how she looks.
